name: Chocolate Raspberry Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine chocolate morsels, heavy cream, and butter.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Stir in the raspberry jam. Cover with plastic wrap and freeze for 20 minutes.
4. Drop mixture by spoonfuls onto a foil-lined cookie sheet.
5. Freeze for 15 minutes, then roll into balls.
6. Freeze until firm.
Coating:
1. Over hot (not boiling) water, melt white baking bars or chocolate morsels and shortening, stirring until smooth.
2. Drop frozen truffles one at a time into the melted coating.
3. Stir quickly to coat, then remove with a fork, shaking off excess.
4. Place on a cookie sheet; chill until set.
5. Store refrigerated.
